nodes.name: Webhook: Blog Published
nodes.notes: Phase 3+ workflow. Triggered when a new blog post is published. Expected payload: { title, url, content, category, author }

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: Validate webhook payload. Truncate content for Claude prompt limits.

nodes.name: Claude: X Thread
nodes.notes: Generate 10-12 tweet X thread from blog post content.

nodes.name: Claude: LinkedIn Post
nodes.notes: Generate LinkedIn post derivative from blog content.

nodes.name: Claude: Discord Announcement
nodes.notes: Generate Discord announcement derivative from blog content.

nodes.name: Write All Drafts
nodes.notes: Write X thread, LinkedIn post, and Discord announcement to queue/drafts/.

nodes.name: Discord: Derivatives Ready
nodes.notes: Notify Vew that blog derivatives are ready for review.
